positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic mountain range bathed in ethereal sunrise light, detailed with subtle linework suggesting winding river paths and alpine meadows. The composition is centered, featuring clean, scalable forms suitable for textile printing. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets detailed woodcut engraving. Color palette: Monochromatic deep indigo and warm cream, with high contrast. Lighting: Dramatic side-lighting creating deep shadows and crisp outlines. Focus on negative space and strong graphic impact. Print-ready, vector graphic aesthetic.
